name: Sashin Cesarean Perimortem (PMCS)
description: Isar da cesarean na gaggawa a cikin mintuna 4 na kama zuciya na uwa don ba da damar ingantaccen CPR da yuwuwar tsira ga jariri. Mahaifa yana matsawa aorta da IVC -- bayarwa kuma yana farfado da uwa.
steps: Ci gaba CPR ba tare da katsewa ba.
Yi tsaka-tsakin tsaka-tsakin tsaka-tsakin tsaye daga cibiya zuwa pubis ta fata da fascia.
Ƙarfafa sashin ƙananan mahaifa a kwance.
Bayar da jariri -- lokacin bayanin kula.
Mika jariri ga mai bada na biyu don farfado da jariri.
Sanya mahaifa da ciki idan tabbataccen rufewa ba zai yiwu nan da nan ba.
Ci gaba da farfaɗowar mahaifa -- ROSC yana yiwuwa bayan lalatawar mahaifa.
warnings: Lokacin yanke shawara don bayarwa dole ne ya kasance ƙasa da mintuna 5 don mafi kyawun sakamakon uwa da tayi.
Wannan hanya ita ce makoma ta ƙarshe -- kawai idan mahaifiyar tana cikin kamawar zuciya kuma haihuwa ta kusa (> makonni 20 ciki).
Yana buƙatar horon matakin likita. Ya kamata likitocin yaƙi su shirya filin da goyan baya, ba yin aiki da kansu ba.
source: JTS Obstetric CPG / ACOG Emergency Guidelines
